name: Kartoffelsuppe (Potato Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium Potatoes, Peeled and Thinly Sliced
1 Medium Onion, Peeled and Thinly Sliced
4 Stalks of Celery Leaves, Peeled and Cut into Chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice potatoes, onion, and celery.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté the vegetables for 3 to 5 minutes until they begin to soften.
3. Add all the chopped vegetables to the pot and cover with enough boiling water to just submerge them. Place the bay leaf and salt in the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to simmer until the vegetables are tender (about 20-25 minutes).
5. Remove the bay leaf and use an immersion blender to mash the vegetables into the soup.
6. Stir in butter and adjust the thickness of the soup with milk as desired. Heat gently until warm.
7. Ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with chopped parsley.
